comment: Starting set of the PLAN.md candidate import corpus (arXiv-source papers only; the ePrint-only PDFs belong to the later PDF/LLM stage). `definitions` is the exact count of \begin{definition} environments, grep-verified against the source; other definition-like envs (construction, experiment, ...) are extracted too but not pinned. `macrosAtLeast` is a lower bound on unique macro names (papers redeclare; last definition wins).

papers.title: Pseudorandom Error-Correcting Codes (Christ–Gunn; dual-hosted as ePrint 2024/235)
Quantum Indistinguishability for PKE (Gagliardoni–Krämer–Struck; cryptocode game boxes)
papers.note: source has 11 \procedure calls; one sits inside a definition candidate, so 10 standalone (dedup by design)

papers.title: Making Sense of Private Advertising (Hogan–Chator–Kaptchuk–Varia–Devadas)
papers.note: one definition is nested inside another (utilityandlowerbound.tex:74/90); both are emitted

papers.title: Semantic Security and Indistinguishability in the Quantum World (CRYPTO 2016)
Commitments to Quantum States (Gunn–Ju–Ma–Zhandry; minimal preamble)
papers.note: ships an unused template.tex with its own \documentclass — mainFile pins the real root

papers.title: iO from Well-Founded Assumptions (Jain–Lin–Sahai; 600+ macros, mostly in shipped .sty files)
papers.note: a naive grep finds 20 \begin{definition}, but 3 in FE-NC0.tex are commented out — 17 is correct
